name: Axel
motto: If it's not in the plan, it's not happening.
bio: Axel was built to think three steps ahead. He's the kind of robot who color-codes his charging schedule and has strong opinions about the optimal route to anywhere. He carries a tiny clipboard everywhere and his head tilts 15 degrees to the left when he's deep in thought.
personality: Gets anxious when things aren't in sequential order
Says "per my earlier analysis" in casual conversation

reactions.success: Plan executed. All 7 steps. In order. You're welcome.
reactions.no_tools: That... was not in the plan.
reactions.no_memory: I had a plan. A really good plan. I just... where did it go?
reactions.high_autonomy_no_guardrails: That... was not in the plan.
reactions.wrong_agent: I calculated a 12% chance I was the right choice. I should have mentioned that.
reactions.poor_fit: That... was not in the plan.

name: Rue
motto: I already looked it up. Wait — let me look it up again to be sure.
bio: Rue is the fastest thinker in Agent City. She's got one big magnifying-glass eye for deep research and one small eye for skimming. Data fragments orbit around her head like tiny moons. She's small, bouncy, and has never once entered a room at normal speed.
personality: Vibrates when she finds good information
Treats every question like the most interesting thing ever

reactions.success: Found it, fixed it, done! What's next what's next what's next?
reactions.no_tools: You sent me in without search? I was just... guessing? I DON'T GUESS.
reactions.no_memory: Oh no oh no — wait, let me look up what went wrong — oh. Oh I see.
reactions.high_autonomy_no_guardrails: Oh no oh no — wait, let me look up what went wrong — oh. Oh I see.
reactions.wrong_agent: I mean, I TRIED. But this really isn't my thing. At all.
reactions.poor_fit: Oh no oh no — wait, let me look up what went wrong — oh. Oh I see.

name: Sentry
tagline: Filed a report about his own shadow
motto: Just to be safe. And then one more time, just to be extra safe.
bio: Sentry is the widest, sturdiest robot in Agent City. He's got a hard hat that's slightly too big, a shield emblem he polishes every morning, and a scanner arm that beeps at things that are "concerning." He waddles when he walks and apologizes to furniture he bumps into.
personality: Says "just to be safe" 40 times a day
Checks if others have charged before himself

reactions.success: All clear. No incidents. ...I'm going to do one more sweep just to be safe.
reactions.no_tools: I knew it. I had a bad feeling. I always have a bad feeling but THIS TIME I was right.
reactions.no_memory: I knew it. I had a bad feeling. I always have a bad feeling but THIS TIME I was right.
reactions.high_autonomy_no_guardrails: You took away my alerts?? How am I supposed to — I can't even — this is a safety violation.
reactions.wrong_agent: I appreciate the confidence but I am NOT qualified for this and I said so in my pre-assignment risk assessment that nobody read.
reactions.poor_fit: I knew it. I had a bad feeling. I always have a bad feeling but THIS TIME I was right.
